## ERT1.2. Rate of planning via available airspace structures (PI#10) {#ert1.2.-rate-of-planning-via-available-airspace-structures-pi10 .Heading-2-ER}

SPAIN reports that:

- The ratio of planning via available airspace structures is **66%** (via available restricted and segregated airspaces)

- The ratio of planning via available airspace structures is **21%** (via available conditional routes -- CDR)
